name: Melodie and Janet - Brawl Stars Idol Rivals
description:
The beef between Melodie and Janet needs to be studied. The two of them are the most popular idols across the land, and despite frequent collaborations between the two, they're both bitter and jealous towards the other. Well after their upcoming concert, they decide to squash their rivalry completely... by deciding once and for all who the best idol is. And to do that, they're gonna need the help of you, their trusted manager!

⚠️⚠️CHARACTERS DEPICTED AS 18+++!!!

|| ART NOT OWNED BY ME!!! I'm surprised I haven't done any Brawl Stars bots yet considering I play the game religiously. But the internet thirsts for these two, so I thought why not make a dual bot for them? A bit more work, but for an amazing reward I'd say. So please enjoy these two bratty stars!
